root.rep_text: แบบรายงานที่ 8 - แบบรายงานการดำรงสินทรัพย์สภาพคล่อง2
root.sql: select td.rowx, td.operate_date, coalesce((select sum(pka_acc_glbal.fp_get_balance_gl(account_id,td.operate_date)) from sc_acc_m_account_master where asset_old_group = 'D05'),0) as coll_10, coalesce((select sum(pka_acc_glbal.fp_get_balance_gl(account_id,td.operate_date)) from sc_acc_m_account_master where asset_old_group = 'D10'),0) as coll_11, coalesce((select sum(pka_acc_glbal.fp_get_balance_gl(account_id,td.operate_date)) from sc_acc_m_account_master where asset_old_group = 'D15'),0) as coll_12, coalesce((select sum(pka_acc_glbal.fp_get_balance_gl(account_id,td.operate_date)) from sc_acc_m_account_master where asset_old_group = 'D20'),0) as coll_13, coalesce((select sum(pka_acc_glbal.fp_get_balance_gl(account_id,td.operate_date)) from sc_acc_m_account_master where asset_old_group = 'D25'),0) as coll_14, coalesce((select sum(pka_acc_glbal.fp_get_balance_gl(account_id,td.operate_date)) from sc_acc_m_account_master where asset_old_group = 'D30'),0) as coll_15 from ( select level as rowx, pka.to_date(level||'/'!month!'/'!year!'') as operate_date from generate_series(1, extract(day from (date_trunc('month', pka.to_date('1/'!month!'/'!year!'')) + interval '1 month' - interval '1 day'))::int) as level ) td where 1=1 /*WHERE*/
